# meemur

> We make the web work for you. meemur is a boutique, founder-led digital agency serving clients worldwide that designs, builds, and measures high-performing web and e-commerce experiences, then grows them with analytics, CRO, and paid social.

meemur is founded and run by Onur Yanar, a front-end and analytics specialist with 10+ years of experience across 60+ brands. It works remotely with clients anywhere, who deal directly with the person doing the work. The site is bilingual: English at the root and Turkish under `/tr/`. Contact: contact@meemur.com.

## Pages

- [Home](https://meemur.com/): What meemur does and how it works.
- [Services](https://meemur.com/services): Web & e-commerce builds, cross-platform apps, analytics & measurement, CRO & experimentation, accessibility & performance, and social media ads.
- [Work](https://meemur.com/work): Selected case studies.
- [About & Contact](https://meemur.com/about): Founder background and the contact form.
- [Privacy policy](https://meemur.com/privacy): What meemur collects and how data is handled.

## Türkçe (Turkish)

- [Ana Sayfa](https://meemur.com/tr/): meemur ne yapar ve nasıl çalışır.
- [Hizmetler](https://meemur.com/tr/services): Web & e-ticaret, mobil uygulamalar, analitik, dönüşüm optimizasyonu, performans ve sosyal medya reklamları.
- [İşlerimiz](https://meemur.com/tr/work): Seçkin işler.
- [Hakkımızda](https://meemur.com/tr/about): Kurucu hakkında ve iletişim formu.
- [Gizlilik](https://meemur.com/tr/privacy): Veri işleme politikası.
